name: Sunflower Eggs
recipeIngredient: 4 Oz Green Chile Peppers, 1 Can Rinsed and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the 3 oz of uncooked fine noodles for 1 1/2 cups.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan. Sauté until the onions are translucent.
4. Add the diced tomatoes, green chile peppers (1 can), sugar, vinegar, salt, cinnamon, and cloves. Stir to combine.
5. Pour in 3/4 cup of water and bring the mixture to a simmer.
6. Crack the large eggs into the pan one at a time, allowing the sauce to cover each egg as it is added.
7. Cook until the eggs are set but still runny on top.
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles if desired.
